title: Tyler (TYL) & NY Police Team Up for Firearm Background Check
text: Tyler (TYL) implements State Firearm Point of Contact Background Check solution for the New York State Police, aligning with the 2022 gun-safety legislation in New York.

title: Tyler Technologies Aids New York State Police in Implementation of Stronger Background Checks for Firearms
text: PLANO, Texas--(BUSINESS WIRE)---- $TYL #TylerTech--Tyler Technologies announced that New York State Police has successfully gone live with Tyler's State Firearm POC Background Check solution.

title: Tyler (TYL) Workforce Suite Sees Growing Adoption by Fed Agencies
text: Tyler (TYL) witnesses the increased adoption of its Workforce Case Management suite as federal agencies continue to ensure they have the right systems to promote diversity, equity, inclusion and accessibility in the federal workforce.

title: Tyler Technologies Announces Growing Adoption of Workforce Case Management Suite for Federal Government
text: PLANO, Texas--(BUSINESS WIRE)---- $TYL #TylerTech--Tyler Technologies announced the growing selection and implementation of its Workforce Case Management suite among federal government agencies.

title: Tyler Technologies (TYL) Up 0.8% Since Last Earnings Report: Can It Continue?
text: Tyler Technologies (TYL) reported earnings 30 days ago. What's next for the stock?
